arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for LaLiga match against Getafe
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Wednesday’s away match against Getafe in LaLiga, just a few days ahead of the crucial Copa del Rey Final against Barcelona in Sevilla. Mbappe and Mendy aren’t available just yet even though they rejoined the squad in training this Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Arteta receives Bukayo Saka transfer warning as Real Madrid circle
arts.sum: However, Hargreaves believes that Saka could be tempted to join Real Madrid in his mid-twenties if he helps Arsenal win several pieces of silverware over the next few years. Arsenal superstar Bukayo Saka has been tipped to join Real Madrid by former Manchester United midfielder Owen Hargreaves.

arts.ttl: “They could end up paying €140m” – Real Madrid backed to sign Arsenal superstar
arts.sum: It is becoming increasingly clear within Real Madrid that significant change is likely to be made in the coming years. It has been a desperately disappointing season so far for the reigning La Liga and European champions, and they may look to the transfer market in their efforts to turn around their fortunes. arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly ready to rival Real Madrid and Barcelona for the signature of a £68.7m midfielder this summer.

arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe faces a race against time to feature for Real Madrid in Saturday's Copa del Rey final.
